basic_details.job_title: EIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Engineers India Limited (EIL) - A Navratna PSU (A Govt. of India Undertaking)
basic_details.post_name: Anywhere in India and abroad - Head Office New Delhi/Gurugram, Regional Offices at Chennai, Vadodara, Kolkata, Branch Office at Mumbai, Inspection Offices and Construction Sites
basic_details.short_information: Engineers India Limited Special Recruitment Drive 2026: Get the latest EIL recruitment notification 2026 for 22 vacancies across multiple posts under Special Recruitment Drive for SC, ST & OBCs (HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/04). The online application process starts on 9th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 01 June 2026. Find EIL vacancies on the official website www.engineersindia.com. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for EIL Recruitment 2026 apply o

qualification.details: All eligibility criteria including age, qualification, and experience are as on the cut-off date of 30.04.2026. Only Full Time Regular courses will be considered (except CA/CMA/CS). The specified qualification should have been acquired within the prescribed minimum course duration. Candidates are required to specify the exact percentage marks up to two decimal places; rounding off of marks is not allowed.

vacancy_details.Discipline: Hotel Management / Hospitality & Hotel Administration / Hospitality Administration

category_wise_vacancy.Discipline: Hotel Management / Hospitality & Hotel Administration / Hospitality Administration

salary_details.details: CTC is calculated on basic pay at the lowest of the scale and includes Basic Pay, DA, HRA, Other Perks & Allowances, encashment of earned leaves, and Retirement benefits as applicable. Post-Retirement Medical Coverage Scheme is applicable to candidates who are 45 years of age or below as on the date on which they come on the regular rolls of the Company.

selection_process: Senior Manager (Projects), Senior Manager (Electrical), Manager (HR), Engineer (all) Interview New Delhi / Gurugram or through Video Conferencing
Jr. Draftsman Gr I (all), Jr. Draftsman Gr II (Piping), Junior Assistant Grade III-HR, Junior Assistant Grade III-Hospitality Skill Test Venue to be intimated separately to shortlisted candidates
Senior Manager & Manager IInd AC Sleeper rail fare (by shortest route)
Engineer III AC Sleeper rail fare (by shortest route)
Jr. Draftsman Gr I, Jr. Draftsman Gr II, Junior Assistant Grade III-HR, Junior Assistant Grade III-Hospitality IInd Sleeper rail fare (by shortest route)

Prescribed qualification/experience are the minimum and mere possession does not entitle a candidate for the selection process. EIL may restrict the number of candidates to be called for interview/skill test by raising the percentage of marks and/or relevance of experience. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for interview/skill test through email.
Travel Allowance (TA) for Outstation Candidates called for Interview/Skill Test:
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the career link on EIL's official website http://www.engineersindia.com. Online submission will be permitted between 0000 hrs on 09.05.2026 till 2359 hrs on 01.06.2026. A candidate can apply for one position only — in case of multiple applications, the latest one shall be considered as final and older applications shall be rejected without notice. Applications once submitted cannot be withdrawn.

Any change in advertisement (including extension of last date) shall be published on EIL's website only — no separate notification shall be issued in press/other medium. The email address specified in the application should be valid/functional for at least 24 months from the date of submission.
Documents to be Scanned and Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Latest passport size colour photograph in .jpg/.jpeg format (not more than 75 KB)
Signature in .jpg/.jpeg format (not more than 25 KB)
Date of birth proof — Class X Certificate/Marksheet in .jpg/.jpeg format
All experience certificates
Certificate/valid documentary proof regarding pay scale (as per Note 3/Note 4 on page 11 of notification) uploaded along with experience documents
Disability certificate (PwD) in .jpg/.jpeg/.pdf format (not more than 500 KB)
Caste certificate — OBC/SC/ST/EWS certificate, if applicable, in .jpg/.jpeg/.pdf format (not more than 500 KB)

Note: OBC-NCL certificate must be valid as on the closing date of application (25.05.2026). Any candidate applying without uploading valid OBC-NCL certificate will be rejected. Only castes included in the Central list of OBC as given in the official website of National Commission for Backward Classes will be considered.
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Interview/Skill Test (on being called):
Proof of Age — Certificate for passing Matriculation/Higher Secondary mentioning date of birth
Educational qualifications — all year/semester marksheets and certificates
Proof of Experience — Service Certificate of past employment indicating designation, date of joining and release [From-To] & continuity in present organization
Pay slips/Salary certificate (duly authenticated) for the past 3 months
Certificate/valid documentary proof regarding pay scale (as per Note 3/Note 4)
PwD Certificate with photograph (40% or more permanent disability, as per format prescribed by Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment)
SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/EWS certificate from the Competent Authority (if applicable)
Aadhaar Card
Apprenticeship certificate (NATS/NAPS) if applicable
NOC from present employer (for candidates working in PSU/Govt. Sector/Govt. Institution)
Printout of online application form
Apply Online at: http://www.engineersindia.com (Career Section)
important_instructions: This is a Special Recruitment Drive for SC, ST & OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates only. Only Full Time Regular courses will be considered (except CA/CMA/CS). The specified qualification should have been acquired within the prescribed minimum course duration. The cut-off date for qualification, experience, and upper age is 30.04.2026. A candidate can apply for one position only. Multiple applications will result in the latest being retained; older applications will be rejected without notice. Applications once submitted cannot be withdrawn. No cancellation/withdrawal requests shall be entertained. OBC-NCL certificate must be in Central format and valid as on the closing date (25.05.2026). Applications without valid OBC-NCL certificate will be rejected. Candidates working in PSU/Govt. Sector must forward their application through proper channel or submit NOC from present employer at the time of interview/skill test. Failure to do so will result in cancellation of candidature and no TA shall be paid. Candidates from PSUs/Govt. Sector must have completed minimum 1 year of service in the immediate lower pay scale as on date of submission of application. Applicant should essentially have proficiency in computers. Failure to submit supporting work experience documents will render claim of experience invalid and make the candidate ineligible from further consideration. PwD candidates — persons with 40% or more permanent nature of disability only are eligible to apply under PwD category. Furnishing of wrong/false information will be a disqualification and EIL will not be responsible for any consequences thereof. EIL reserves the right to cancel the advertisement and/or the selection process without assigning any reason. Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Delhi. Candidates are advised to visit https://www.engineersindia.com regularly for all updates regarding the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: Engineers India Limited has announced 22 vacancies across 15 posts under the Special Recruitment Drive for SC, ST and OBC (NCL) candidates through Advertisement No. HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/04.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window opens on 09 May 2026 (00:00 hrs) and closes on 01 June 2026 (23:59 hrs) on the EIL recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q3. Which categories are eligible to apply for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: This EIL recruitment is a Special Recruitment Drive exclusively for SC, ST and OBC (Non‑Creamy Layer) candidates, and applications from other categories will not be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What posts are available in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The notification includes posts such as Senior Manager (Projects/Electrical), Manager (HR), Engineer (various disciplines), Jr. Draftsman (Process/Civil/Piping/Civil‑Structural) and Junior Assistant Grade‑III (HR & Hospitality).

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: EIL will shortlist candidates based on eligibility and call them for Interview (for Senior Manager/Manager/Engineer) and Skill Test (for Jr. Draftsman and Junior Assistant posts), and only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale and approximate CTC in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scales range from Rs. 90,000–2,40,000 for Senior Manager, Rs. 80,000–2,20,000 for Manager, Rs. 60,000–1,80,000 for Engineer, and Rs. 25,000/26,500–1,15,000 for Jr. Draftsman/Junior Assistant, with approximate CTC going up to about Rs. 30.29 lakh per annum for Senior Manager.

faq.question: Q7. What is the eligibility cut-off date for age, qualification and experience in EIL SRD 2026?
faq.answer: For this Special Recruitment Drive, 30 April 2026 is the cut‑off date for calculating upper age, minimum educational qualifications and required post‑qualification experience.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for more than one post in EIL Special Recruitment Drive 2026?
faq.answer: No, each candidate can apply for only one position; in case of multiple applications, the latest submitted application will be treated as final and the rest will be rejected without notice.
